title: Fix blank login page and Internet Identity authentication

requirements.summary: Fix LoginPage to render correctly on initial load and display login UI immediately without blank screen
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the root URL '/' displays the TrackFlow login page with a visible 'Login with Internet Identity' button instead of a blank screen
The login page does not remain blank while AuthClient is initializing — a loading spinner or the full login UI is shown immediately
Clicking 'Login with Internet Identity' triggers the Internet Identity popup correctly
After successful authentication, the user is redirected to the pricing page (/pricing)
If the user is already authenticated on page load, they are automatically redirected to /dashboard without seeing the login page

file_operations.description: Fix the component to render the login UI (TrackFlow branding, tagline, and 'Login with Internet Identity' button) immediately on mount instead of showing a blank screen. Remove any conditional rendering that waits for authentication state to be resolved before displaying the UI. Ensure the component shows a loading spinner only during the actual login process (loginStatus === 'logging-in'), not during initial AuthClient initialization. Add proper error handling for login failures and ensure successful login redirects to /pricing as specified in the BuildRequest.

requirements.summary: Fix App.tsx route tree and auth guard to prevent blank screens and ensure correct redirects
acceptanceCriteria: The app never renders a completely blank white page on any route
Unauthenticated users visiting any protected route (e.g., /dashboard) are redirected to /login
Authenticated users visiting /login or / are redirected to /dashboard
The auth guard waits for Internet Identity initialization before performing redirects, preventing redirect loops or flashes of blank content

file_operations.description: Fix the route configuration and authentication guard logic to prevent blank screens. Ensure the router renders a loading state while Internet Identity is initializing (loginStatus === 'initializing') instead of attempting redirects or rendering blank content. Fix the auth guard in the ProtectedLayout component to wait for identity resolution before deciding on redirects. Ensure authenticated users at / or /login are redirected to /dashboard, and unauthenticated users at protected routes are redirected to /login. Verify all route paths are correctly configured and the router provider is properly initialized. Add a root-level loading fallback that displays while the authentication state is being determined to prevent any blank screen flashes.

requirements.summary: Verify context provider ordering and identity state availability throughout the component tree
acceptanceCriteria: useInternetIdentity() returns a valid identity state (isAuthenticated, login, logout) on the LoginPage without throwing context errors
No 'Cannot read properties of undefined' or missing context errors appear in the browser console on initial load
The QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider correctly wrap the router/app so all pages have access to both contexts
The backend actor is created successfully after login and queries to the backend (e.g., getUserProfile) work without actor initialization errors

file_operations.description: Verify and fix the context provider ordering to ensure InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider correctly wrap the App component. Confirm that the provider hierarchy allows all child components (including LoginPage and protected routes) to access both the identity context and query client without errors. Add error boundaries if needed to catch and display any context-related initialization errors gracefully instead of showing a blank screen. Ensure the root element mounts correctly and the provider tree is initialized before any route resolution occurs.
